titleStmt.title: SII 9.155: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 155. (A.R. No. 519-A of 1915.) ON THE SAME SLAB AS NO. 143.

summary.p: This is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 11, Kshaya, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti corresponding probably to A.D. 1086 December 25 Friday. The date is not verifiable. It records that, with the permission of Bennarasa, the chief of Māṟaṭa three-hundred, a grant of 30 mattars of land was made for the service of the god Kambēśvara, and for the pay of the musicians and their band. At the time of the gift, the Maṇḍalika (i.e., Jōyimayyarasa ?) was ruling over Eḍadoṟe two-thousand and Kallakeḷage five-hundred.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
matta maṇḍaḷika Eḍedoṟircchāsiramuma kalla keḷagainūṟumanāThis is written in continuation of A.R. No. 519 of
ḷuttamire cāḷukyavikramavarṣada 11 neya kṣayasaṁvatsaraduttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntiyoḷ maṇḍaḷika
māṟaṭa mūnūṟaṟa manneya bennarasanaṁ sāvadisi binna paṁgeydu kaṁbēśvarada khaṇḍasphuṭitta jīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ
māṟaṭanāḍa baḷiyalā bāyinūra teṁkaṇa holavēreyoḷpiriya kōlalu kariya nela matta 30
Uḻchaṁbāḍa keḷagaṇa holavēreyoḷ gāndharvigarggaṁ pāḍāvigaṁgaṁ pātrakke maddaḷeyavaṁgayā kōla ma 30
Ī dharmmavanāvanānumaḷidavaṁ bāṇarāsiyoḷaṁ prayāgeyoḷaṁ kurukṣētradoḷavargghyatīrtthadoḷaṁ
rukṣētradoḷaṁ sāsira kavileyumaṁ sāsirvvar brāhmaṇarumanaḷidava . svadattaṁ paradattam vā yō
harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . bīrarasaṁgaṁ sitapaṁkē
ruhadaḷanayane rebbikabbegamatigaṁbhīraguṇaṁ puṭṭida sādāratayoḍavuṭṭe kaṁbaneṁba ma
hātmaṁ . parivārasurabhi kaṁbana piriyaṁgane haṁmikabbe baḷikādaḷ sundararūpavati ka
ḷāvati karamesedaḷ kanakiyabbe gōtrapavitre . Ene negaḻda kaṁbaṇayyana tanayaṁ cāvuṇḍa
rāyanātana tammaṁ vinutayaśaṁ nāgaṇanoḷpina kaṇi yenipa jōyiyaṁ kiṟudammaṁ . Anibarggaṁ kiṟi
yaṁ sajjanapūjya sujanavanajavanakaḷahaṁśaṁ vinayanidhi sakaḷavidyāvaranidhiyene kaṁbagauṇḍanoḷsamanāvaṁ .
svasti kaṁbēsvaradēvara pullavaḍuga nāgaṁṇaṁge matta 3 .
Digital edition of SII 9.155 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
